rule: Context strength explains what DueSight can responsibly infer without promoting it to official finance, ownership or UBO proof.

items.meaning: DueSight beoordeelt eventuele groeps- of transactiecontext voor True Legends IT B.V. alleen wanneer die uit targetrelevante bronnen komt.
items.missing_for_official_claim: Current registry extract, shareholder register, transaction document or licensed provider output with document hash.

items.meaning: DueSight heeft publiek brongebonden management-/rolcontext voor True Legends IT B.V. gevonden.
items.missing_for_official_claim: Official register/director extract or client-confirmed management schedule for legally binding role claims.

items.meaning: Er zijn groei-, award- en marktcontextsignalen gevonden, maar die blijven context zolang primaire award/finance artifacts ontbreken.
items.missing_for_official_claim: Primary award page/PDF/article capture plus annual account, seller P&L or provider finance document with hash.

items.meaning: LinkedIn/professional-profile routes leveren corroboratie en discovery-hints, geen zelfstandige ownership- of personeelsclaim.
items.missing_for_official_claim: Official website, register or contracted provider corroboration for each people/company profile claim.

items.meaning: De finance-route is technisch aanwezig, maar de replay heeft geen target-specifieke officiële filing of P&L opgehaald.
items.missing_for_official_claim: KVK/Dataservice annual account, XBRL/PDF filing, seller P&L or licensed provider finance document with source hash.

items.meaning: Publieke structuurcontext kan richting geven, maar juridisch eigendom/UBO blijft niet officieel bewezen in deze replay.
items.missing_for_official_claim: Lawful UBO extract, shareholder register, KvK extract or licensed ownership graph/provider evidence with document hash.
